features.name: super.new with member function argument in inheritance
features.description: Code should include a derived class that calls super.new() with a base class member function call as an argument

features.name: base class method with this reference returning integer
features.description: Code should include a base class with a protected member function that captures this into a local class variable and returns an integer value

features.name: class inheritance with constructor argument evaluation order
features.description: Code should include a class inheritance hierarchy where a base class constructor takes an integer argument and a derived class passes a base class method result to super.new()
